ganache.name: Ganache
instructions: Chop the chocolate into small pieces and place it in a large stainless steel bowl.

Heat cream in a large, high-sided saucepan over medium high heat, stirring frequently, until it just begins to boil. The cream can boil over quickly at this stage, so watch it closely. Immediately remove from heat and pour over chopped chocolate.
Stir until chocolate is completely melted and mixture is smooth. Cool completely and then store in refrigerator.

garlic-shrimp-wrap-recipe-comedera.name: Garlic Shrimp Wrap Recipe
garlic-shrimp-wrap-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de wrap de camarones al ajillo
instructions: Limpia los camarones hasta que queden sin impurezas. Retira la vena del centro.
Pela los dientes de ajo y filetea muy bien. Trocea el perejil finamente.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil once at temperature, add shrimp and paddle for 7 minutes.
When the shrimp are pink, add their steamed garlic teeth, some salt to suit and mix. Cooking for 3 minutes.
Apaga el fuego y agrega el perejil troceado para que se cocine con con el vapor. Reserva.
Lava muy bien las hojas de lechuga y corta en rodajas el tomate.
Dora un poco tus tortillas, luego haz una cama con la lechuga y esparce un poco las rodajas de tomate.
Add a portion of shrimp, your favorite sauce and roll up.
Now she'll be ready to have a taste.

gimlet-cocktail.name: Gimlet Cocktail
instructions:
Combine 2 oz. Plymouth gin and ¾ oz. Lime Cordial in a cocktail shaker. Add large cold ice cubes and shake briefly but with conviction until well chilled, about 30 seconds. Strain into chilled coupe glass and garnish with lime wheel.
Editor’s note: This gimlet cocktail recipe first appeared on Epicurious in January 2012.

gladyss-zucchini-soup.name: Gladys's Zucchini Soup
instructions: Cook and stir ground turkey, sausage, bell pepper, onion, and celery in a large pot over medium-high heat until meat is no longer pink and vegetables are tender, 10 to 12 minutes.

Stir tomatoes, zucchini, chicken broth, Italian seasoning, sea salt, tarragon, garlic powder, and black pepper into turkey mixture; bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, and simmer until flavors combine, about 1 hour. Ladle soup into bowls and garnish with Parmesan cheese.

glazed-chicken-chicken-recipe-comedera.name: Glazed Chicken Chicken Recipe
glazed-chicken-chicken-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de pollo de pollo glaseado

ingredients.item: 600 gr de pechuga de pollo molida

instructions: Inicia la receta y agrega en un bol el zumo de naranja y la mermelada.
He also adds the rosemary to his taste and mixes very well. Reserve.
Now, put into a bowl the chicken ground with salt, pepper and garlic and thyme. Gather both eggs as well.
Agrega al bol el tocino picadito para integrar.
Mix all the ingredients very well until they are well integrated.
Once integrated, take a large piece of aluminum paper and start to extend the chicken mixture to achieve a rectangle.
Once ready, add mozzarella cheese and scatter nuts and dehydrated cranberries.
Con ayuda del papel aluminio gira y forma un rollo. Luego cierra y coloca en la fuente de horno.
Hornea at 170 ° C for 30 minutes, then remove from the frying oven with a mixture of jam and juice.
Take them back to the oven for an additional 15 minutes at 180 ° C or till golden.
Remove from the oven and join with your favorite garrison. Enjoy!

gluten-free-buckwheat-or-buckwheat-panca.name: Gluten-free Buckwheat Or Buckwheat Pancakes
gluten-free-buckwheat-or-buckwheat-panca.original_name: Tortitas de trigo sarraceno o alforfón sin gluten

ingredients.item: 1 taza de harina de trigo sarraceno
1 taza de leche (puede ser leche de vaca, leche de almendras, leche de avena, etc.)
1 teaspoon of sugar (optional, you can adjust quantity as per your preferences)
1 cucharadita de polvo de hornear (levadura en polvo)
1 cucharada de aceite de coco o aceite vegetal
2 tablespoons melted butter (or vegetable oil) to grease frying pan

instructions: In a large bowl, mix the frying wheat flour, sugar (if you wish), salt and baking powder. At another bowl, beat your balls till they're well ground. Swallow milk into the scramped eggs and mix well. Add the liquid mixture to dry ingredients (Saracene wheat flour, sugar, salt and baking powder). Mix till all ingredients are well combined. The mass should have a smooth consistency.

Warm an anti-stick frying pan with medium heat and lightly grease with melted butter or vegetable oil. Fold about 1 / 4 cup of dough into hot frying pan to form every pancake. Gently extend mass into circles to get the desired size. Cooking pancakes for about 2-3 minutes on each side or till you see bubbles on the surface and the edges are golden. Turn the pancakes carefully using a spatula and cook the other side till it's golden. Repeat the process with the rest of the dough, grease the frying pan as necessary to prevent pancakes from gluing. Serve hot Saracene wheat pancakes with your favorite ingredients, such as honey, maple syrup, fresh fruit or whipped cream.

gluten-free-texas-sheet-cake.name: Gluten-free Texas Sheet Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease an 18x13x1-inch baking pan with cooking spray.

Make the cake: Combine butter, water, and cocoa powder in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir together and bring to a boil. Remove from the heat and mix in sugar and vanilla extract. Set aside and allow to cool for about 15 minutes.

Whisk together buttermilk and eggs in a small bowl. Combine gluten-free flour, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl, mixing well; stir in buttermilk mixture, then stir in cooled cocoa mixture. Stir batter well until no lumps remain. Pour into the prepared pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean and the cake is starting to pull from the sides of the pan, 25 to 35 minutes. Let cool for 15 minutes before frosting.

While the cake is cooling, make the frosting: Bring butter, cocoa powder, and milk to a boil in a saucepan over medium heat. Remove from the heat once milk is boiling; whisk in confectioners' sugar and vanilla. Pour frosting over the warm cake and spread evenly over the top and sides with a spatula. Sprinkle with chopped pecans.
Allow cake and frosting to cool completely before serving, about 30 minutes.

grandpas-vegan-gingerbread-cookies.name: Grandpa's Vegan Gingerbread Cookies
instructions: Combine molasses, brown sugar, and shortening in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Add cold water and blend until smooth. (Shortening may separate a bit; this is fine.)

Sift together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, allspice, ginger, and salt in a separate bowl. Add flour mixture to molasses mixture, blending until incorporated and dough is soft. Shape dough into 2 balls and place in the refrigerator until chilled, 10 to 15 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a baking sheet with cooking spray.

Working in batches, place one ball of chilled dough on a lightly floured surface and roll to 1/4-inch thickness, or 1/2-inch thickness for softer cookies. Cut out cookies with desired cookie cutters and place 1 inch apart on the prepared baking sheet. Repeat with remaining dough.
Bake cookies in the preheated oven until edges are firm, 12 to 13 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack immediately after baking to cool. Allow to cool completely if frosting.

gravy-sauce-recipe-lezzet.name: Gravy Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cup of meat water or chicken water (can also be used for optional olive juice)
1 tsp worcestershire sauce or peel sauce (optional, for aroma)
You can add to your caramelize onion or fungal chopping.
Use Enamel oil instead of butter, sosun reduces circulation.
You can get a lighter sauce by using vegetable juice instead and reducing the amount of starch.

instructions: 1. melt butter in a medium-sized pan.
2. Add the flour to the diluted butter and roast the flour (about 1–2 minutes).
3. Safety add meat water to the mixture, and not to be eaten for continuous rremove.
4. Add salt, pepper and optional Worcestershire sauce after sos began to boil.
5. Bake until about 5–7 minutes on the ground fire.
6. If you want to get a smoother texture, you can serve by passing through the strainer.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

green-apple-martini.name: Green Apple Martini
instructions:
Purée 1 large green apple, scrubbed, cored, cut into 1" pieces, ¼ cup (50 g) sugar, 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and ¼ cup water in a blender until smooth and sugar is dissolved. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small pitcher or large measuring glass, pressing on solids to extract as much juice as possible; discard solids.
Do Ahead: Apple syrup can be made 2 hours ahead; cover and keep chilled, or freeze in ice cube trays for up to 1 month (thaw before using).

Combine 1½ oz. vodka, ½ oz. clear store-bought apple juice, ½ oz. fresh lemon juice, ¼ oz. cognac, ¼ oz. Midori, and ½ oz. apple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside is very cold, about 20 seconds. Strain into a chilled martini glass with 1 maraschino cherry placed in it.
Editor’s Note: Head this way for more of our favorite vodka cocktails →

green-beans-with-almond-butter-sauce.name: Green Beans With Almond Butter Sauce

ingredients.item: . unseasoned rice vinegar or apple cider vinegar
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk ¼ cup unsalted smooth almond butter, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar or apple cider vinegar, and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl until combined and smooth. Set almond sauce aside.
Toast ¼ cup sliced almonds in a dry small skillet over medium-low heat, tossing often, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and season with a pinch of kosher salt. Let cool.

Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet with a lid over medium. Cook 3 garlic cloves, finely chopped, stirring constantly, until fragrant and golden, about 30 seconds. Add 1 lb. green beans, trimmed, and sprinkle with ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook green beans, stirring often, until they're starting to turn bright green, about 1 minute. Pour in ¼ cup water, cover skillet, and cook until green beans are bright green and crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Uncover and continue to cook, stirring often, just until liquid is mostly evaporated, about 1 minute more. Transfer green beans to a medium bowl.

Stir reserved almond sauce if it has separated. Sauce should
be the consistency of a thick vinaigrette; thin with up to 1 Tbsp. water if needed.
Drizzle sauce over green beans and toss to coat.

Transfer green beans to a shallow bowl or platter and scatter toasted almonds over.
Do ahead: Almond sauce can be made 2 days ahead; cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.

green-beans-with-almonds-recipe-comedera.name: Green Beans With Almonds Recipe
green-beans-with-almonds-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de judías verdes con almendras

ingredients.item: 20  ml salsa de soja  (reducida en sal)
50 ml caldo de verduras o agua
80 gr almendra laminada o en cubitos
Aceite de oliva virgen extra (al gusto)

instructions: Wash and dry the beans well, and so does the glove if we use them.
Pela la cebolla y el diente de ajo.
He cuts his onion and puts them in a bowl with half-lemon juice and cold water to cover them. Reserve.
Lamina fino el ajo y cortar en aros la guindilla.
Keep the almonds in a frying pan without oil, if they are raw. Do this carefully as they tend to move from raw to carbonized in a matter of seconds.
Remove the tipples from the beans and cut into two or three pieces, depending on their size.
Put plenty of salty water to boil and cover them for up to two or three minutes. Listen to them quickly and let them cool.
Warm some oil in a frying pan and slightly dour the garlic tooth.
It incorporates beans, frying pan, removes well and adds soya sauce and broth.
Saltea a fuego vivo unos pocos minutos, sin dejar que se cocinen demasiado. Incorpora finalmente la cebolla escurrida, la guindilla y la almendra, y sirve inmediatamente.
Enjoy as a main plate or as an escort.

green-chile-corn-muffins.name: Green Chile Corn Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a muffin tin with cooking spray.
Combine corn, corn muffin mix, Cheddar cheese, green chile peppers, onion, milk, egg, chili powder, and salt in a medium bowl. Mix with a spoon until just combined.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin tin.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and set, 25 to 30 minutes.

green-peanut-butter-smoothie.name: Green Peanut Butter Smoothie
instructions: Blend 1 banana, 1 cup nut milk, 1 cup torn kale, 2 Tbsp. peanut butter, ¼ tsp. ground cinnamon, and ½ cup ice in a blender until smooth.

greenest-mint-and-ginger-pesto.name: Greenest Mint And Ginger Pesto

ingredients.prep: depending on your heat preference, coarsely chopped

instructions: Cook 2 small bunches mint, leaves plucked, and 1 bunch parsley, bottom 2" trimmed, in a large pot of boiling salted water until bright green, about 30 seconds. Using tongs, transfer herbs to a large bowl of ice water; let sit until cool enough to handle.
Meanwhile, blend ½ cup almonds in a blender to a coarse powder; transfer to a medium bowl (no need to wash blender).

Drain herbs; transfer to blender. Add one 3" piece ginger, peeled, 1 large garlic clove, ½–1 jalapeño, depending on your heat preference, coarsely chopped, 2 Tbsp. fish sauce, and 2 tsp. sugar and blend, adding up to ¼ cup water if needed to get it moving, until bright green and very smooth. Transfer purée to bowl with almonds and stir in 1 cup extra-virgin olive oil.

Transfer half of pesto to an airtight container; cover and chill for using later. Stir 1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice into remaining pesto; season with salt.
Do Ahead: Pesto (without lime juice) can be made 2 days ahead. Press plastic wrap directly onto surface; cover and chill, or freeze up to 1 month. Thaw in the fridge overnight. Stir in remaining 1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice just before serving.

greens-and-beans-with-fried-bread.name: Greens And Beans With Fried Bread

ingredients.item: -oz. can white beans (such as butter or cannellini)
Plus 2 tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil; plus more for serving

instructions: Bring wine, garlic, oregano, salt, red pepper flakes, and ¼ cup water to a boil in a large skillet. Add kale, cover pan (a baking sheet works great if you don’t have a big lid), and cook, stirring occasionally, until greens are wilted, about 4 minutes. Mix in beans and ½ cup oil and cook, uncovered, until beans are warmed through, about 2 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. oil in another large skillet over medium. Fry bread in skillet until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to paper towels to drain. (If you don’t have 2 large skillets, cook the bread first and keep it warm in a low oven while you use the same skillet to make the kale and beans.)

To serve, place fried bread on plates and spoon kale mixture and sauce over, dividing evenly. Drizzle with a little oil and vinegar.
Read More: The 29 New Essential Recipes from the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen

grilled-brined-vegetables.name: Grilled Brined Vegetables

ingredients.prep: Spiced Seed Sprinkle, or Grilled Halloumi with Watercress (optional)

instructions: Bring bay leaves, peppercorns, vinegar, sugar, red pepper flakes, 2 Tbsp. salt, and 3 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan. Simmer carrots or beets in brine until crisp-tender, 8–10 minutes for carrots, 25–30 minutes for beets. For radishes, simply add to brine off heat and let cool. Remove vegetables; pat dry. (Save brine to pickle another batch of vegetables.)

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Toss brined vegetables with oil in a large bowl; season lightly with salt. Grill, turning occasionally, until lightly charred in spots, 6–8 minutes. Serve with Green Chile Charmoula, Spiced Seed Sprinkle, or Grilled Halloumi with Watercress, if desired.

grilled-catfish-tacos.name: Grilled Catfish Tacos

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Rub catfish fillets with 1 tablespoon lime juice and season with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, paprika, cumin, and coriander. Spray both sides of each fillet with cooking spray.
Grill catfish on the preheated grill until fish flakes easily with a fork, about 5 minutes on each side. Remove to a plate and keep warm.
Make crema: Mix together sour cream, lime juice, cilantro, and chipotle peppers in a small bowl until well blended; set aside.

Make slaw: Combine red cabbage, onion, and cilantro in a large bowl and squeeze lime juice over the top. Drizzle with olive oil, season with salt and pepper, and toss to combine. Taste and add more salt and pepper if necessary; set aside.
Wrap corn tortillas in a damp paper towel. Heat in the microwave until warm, about 1 minute.
Divide grilled fish evenly over corn tortillas and serve with crema, slaw, Monterey Jack cheese, tomato, avocado, and green onions.

grilled-eggplant-baba-ghanoush.name: Grilled Eggplant Baba Ghanoush

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: za’atar, crushed red pepper flakes, or Aleppo pepper; grilled flatbreads or pita bread (for serving)

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; lightly oil grate. Grill eggplant, turning occasionally, until skin is charred and flesh is fork-tender, 25–35 minutes. (Alternatively, you can tuck vegetables into coals left over from grilling something else. Wait until charcoal is completely covered with ash and no black spots remain. Shake grill to knock excess ash off coal, then rake them around and pile them up around vegetables.) Let cool slightly.
Halve eggplant, scoop flesh into a colander set over a bowl, and let drain at least 15 minutes and up to 1 hour; discard liquid.
Pulse eggplant along with lemon juice, tahini, and garlic in a food processor until smooth; season with salt and pepper.
Drizzle baba ghanoush with oil and top as desired. Serve with flatbreads or pita bread.
Do Ahead: Dip can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

grilled-pork-tenderloin-and-asparagus-wi.name: Grilled Pork Tenderloin And Asparagus With Mustard-herb Sauce
instructions: Toast 2 tsp. fennel seeds in a small skillet until fragrant, about 2 minutes; let cool. Grind in a spice mill or with a mortar and pestle until coarsely ground. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in ¼ tsp. smoked paprika and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal kosher salt. Rub mixture all over 2 pork tenderloins (about 2 lb.), silverskins trimmed and let sit for at least 10 minutes or cover and refrigerate for up to 8 hours.

Meanwhile, whisk together 1 garlic clove, finely grated, 5 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 2 Tbsp. sherry vinegar, 2 Tbsp. whole-grain Dijon mustard, and remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal kosher salt in a small bowl. Whisk in ½ cup (packed) parsley leaves, finely chopped, and set aside.
Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Clean grill grate and brush lightly with canola oil.

Grill pork, turning every few minutes, until charred on all sides and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 140°, 18–23 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest at least 5 minutes before slicing.

About halfway through grilling pork, add 2 bunches asparagus, trimmed to the grill, making sure to place the stalks perpendicular to the grill grates to avoid losing them. Grill, turning occasionally, until lightly charred and crisp-tender, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to a serving platter and toss with half of mustard-herb sauce.

Slice pork and serve alongside asparagus with remaining mustard-herb sauce for drizzling.
Editor’s note: Head this way for more of our favorite ways to cook pork tenderloin →

grilled-razor-clams-recipe-comedera.name: Grilled Razor Clams, Recipe
grilled-razor-clams-recipe-comedera.original_name: Navajas a la plancha, receta fácil
instructions: We'll start our recipe by cleaning up the knives, so you'll put them into a big bowl with water and add the thick salt. Mix and leave moist for about 1 hour.
The water next to the thick salt will allow all sand and impurities from the shellfish to shed.
After this time, we put out the knives and we'll finish cleaning them with cold water. Drain and reserve.
Now we will proceed to heat up a plate, frying pan, grill or grill. We'll add some oil.
Colocaremos nuestras navajas y la dejaremos cocinar por 7 minutos hasta que se vayan abriendo.
While they cook, stick the garlic and snap the parsley. You'll place them in a bowl with olive oil, some salt and pepper, mix and reserve.
You're gonna blow up the knives, place the skin part to a little light. Do it for 3 minutes. Then you'll turn them back.
Take your knives from the plate and put them onto a deep plate and bath them with this vinegar we made for them to have all the flavour.
He's with lemon and they'll be delicious. Enjoy!

grilled-romaine.name: Grilled Romaine
instructions: Drizzle olive oil over romaine lettuce; sprinkle seasoning on top.
Place romaine cut side-down on preheated grill; cook until slightly wilted and charred, about 5 minutes.
Drizzle with lemon juice to serve.
Enjoy!

grilled-snapper-with-mango-and-red-onion.name: Grilled Snapper With Mango And Red Onion Salad

ingredients.item: -lb. or two 2 0.5-lb. head-on whole fish (such as red snapper or black sea bass)

instructions: Place fish on a cutting board and pat dry thoroughly with paper towels. With a sharp knife, make slashes crosswise on a diagonal along the body every 2" on both sides, cutting all the way down to the bones. Season fish generously inside and out with salt. Coat fish with spice mix, packing on more if needed (it should cover the entire fish, head to tail). Let sit at room temperature 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Clean and oil grate.

Drizzle both sides of fish with remaining ⅓ cup vegetable oil to coat. Grill fish undisturbed, 10 minutes. Lift up slightly from one edge to see if skin is puffed and lightly charred and easily releases from grate. If not quite ready, leave alone for another minute or so and try again. Once it is ready, gently slide 2 large metal spatulas underneath and turn over.
Grill fish until the other side is lightly charred and skin is puffed, 8–12 minutes, depending on the size of the fish. Transfer to a platter.

Toss mango, onion, cilantro, lime juice, and a big pinch of salt in a medium bowl. Drizzle with a bit of olive oil and toss again to coat. Scatter mango salad over fish and serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

ground-beef-teriyaki.name: Ground Beef Teriyaki
instructions: Combine ground beef, carrots, and bell pepper in a large skillet over medium to medium-high heat; saute for 4 minutes. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Add zucchini and continue to cook until ground beef is fully cooked through and vegetables are crisp-tender (to your preferred 'doneness'), about 5 more minutes.

Meanwhile, combine soy sauce, 1/3 cup plus 2 tablespoons water, sugar, brown sugar, vinegar, cornstarch, onion powder, ginger, and garlic powder in a small bowl for the sauce. Whisk until well blended.
When the meat and veggies are cooked, whisk sauce once more and pour into the skillet. Use a spatula to mix and get everything off the sides and bottom.
Turn the heat up until sauce begins to bubble, stirring occasionally until mixture becomes thickened and glossy. Turn heat off. Taste and adjust seasonings.

ground-turkey-ricotta-meatballs.name: Ground Turkey-ricotta Meatballs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Combine turkey, ricotta, bread crumbs, basil, egg, salt, and black pepper in a bowl until just mixed.
Scoop mixture into meatballs using a 1-ounce measure onto the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes; flip meatballs. Bake until browned and no longer pink in centers, about 5 minutes more.

guacamole-with-chicharron-recipe-step-by.name: Guacamole with Chiccharra Recipes step by step
guacamole-with-chicharron-recipe-step-by.original_name: Receta de guacamole con chicharrón paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1  chile serrano  (picado finamente - retira las semillas si prefieres un picor suave.)
1  manojo de cilantro fresco (solo las hojas picadas finamente)
Jug with 1 lime or big lemon
Sal de grano y pimienta negra (al gusto)

instructions: Extract the octopus from the avocado and place it in a milling or bowl. Mashaca with a fork or knapper with visible pieces. A rustic guacamole better retains individual flavors than a homogenous purée.
Incorpora la cebolla morada, el chile serrano y el cilantro. Mezcla suavemente de forma envolvente.
Pour the lemon juice at once. Citric acid acts as a natural preservative that keeps the green light for longer.
Agrega el tomate, la sal y la pimienta. Prueba y ajusta la acidez si es necesario.
Blow up with your hands about 1 cm. Fold it gently and serve immediately.
